<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="release-checklist">
<h1>Release checklist</h1>
<p>Use this checklist before publishing a package or tagging a release.</p>
<section id="required-checks">
<h2>Required checks</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>-e<span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;.[dev]&quot;</span>
python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>pytest<span class="w"> </span>-q
python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>compileall<span class="w"> </span>-q<span class="w"> </span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>tests
python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>version
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Run Ruff when the dependency is installed:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>ruff<span class="w"> </span>check<span class="w"> </span>.
python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>ruff<span class="w"> </span>format<span class="w"> </span>--check<span class="w"> </span>.
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Build and inspect distributions from a git checkout or release archive:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>build
python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>twine<span class="w"> </span>check<span class="w"> </span>dist/*
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="manual-review">
<h2>Manual review</h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Confirm the version produced by package metadata, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text2epub.__version__</span></code>, and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text2epub</span> <span class="pre">version</span></code> is identical.</p></li>
<li><p>Confirm <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">LICENSE</span></code> exists and matches the configured project license and classifiers.</p></li>
<li><p>Run EPUBCheck against generated sample EPUBs.</p></li>
<li><p>Test the CLI against a real <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span></code> extraction manifest.</p></li>
<li><p>Confirm docs build with <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">python</span> <span class="pre">-m</span> <span class="pre">sphinx</span> <span class="pre">-b</span> <span class="pre">html</span> <span class="pre">docs</span> <span class="pre">docs/_build/html</span></code>.</p></li>
<li><p>Confirm release notes describe any manifest schema, safety, or CLI behavior changes.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="current-validation-boundary">
<h2>Current validation boundary</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate_epub_package</span></code> is a basic package-level check. It is suitable as a smoke test but not as a publication-grade EPUB validator.</p>
</section>
</section>
